rationale: Gov't Code §2306.068 governs interagency cooperation on affordable housing coordination. It does not prescribe or constrain homestead exemption amounts, so increasing the §11.13(b) exemption creates no conflict.
quote: An agency or institution of the state shall cooperate with the department by providing personnel, information, and technical advice as the department assists the governor in
_note: No direct or indirect conflict identified. The rule addresses interagency cooperation, not tax exemption levels.
